task:
Search the web for information about this error:

Error: `"Error from provider (Console Go): Upstream request failed"` — 400 error when using OpenCode Go provider through Nyro AI Gateway.

Search for:
1. "opencode go upstream request failed" 
2. "opencode go error 400"
3. "Console Go upstream request failed" 
4. "opencode.ai upstream request failed"
5. "Nyro opencode go provider error"

Look for:
- Other users reporting this exact error
- OpenCode Go known issues or outages
- OpenCode Go Discord/community discussions
- GitHub issues on Nyro repo about OpenCode Go
- How to fix or work around

Also fetch any relevant pages or discussions found. Report all findings with source URLs.
